panels.description:
* we show in table ONLY one comparison with smalles pvalue!!!
* REJECT, EFFECT AND BOUNDS - values from last calculated comparison with smallest pvalue

targets.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT
    exp_id AS EXP_ID,
    metric_name AS `METRIC NAME`,
    min(end_date) AS `FIRST CALCULATION (date)`,
    max(end_date) AS `LAST CALCULATION (date)`,
    ---concat(name_1,' vs ',name_2) AS `GROUPS COMPARED`,
    argMax(is_main_metric, created_at) AS `METRIC TYPE`,
    argMax(reject, created_at) AS `REJECT`,
    argMax(left_bound, created_at) AS `LEFT BOUND`,
    argMax(effect, created_at) AS `OBSERVED EFFECT`,
    argMax(right_bound, created_at) AS `RIGHT BOUND`,
    metric_description AS `METRIC DESCRIPTION`
FROM (

    SELECT *
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results AS l GLOBAL ALL LEFT JOIN (
    
        SELECT 
            name AS metric_name,
            description AS metric_description
        FROM marts.exp_metrics_state
        ORDER BY event_date DESC, event_time DESC
        LIMIT 1 BY metric_name
    
    ) AS r USING metric_name
    WHERE end_date BETWEEN toDate($from) AND toDate($to)
    ORDER BY exp_id, metric_name, end_date DESC, pvalue
    LIMIT 1 BY exp_id, metric_name

) AS sq 
GROUP BY `METRIC NAME`, metric_description, exp_id---, `GROUPS COMPARED`
ORDER BY EXP_ID, `METRIC TYPE` DESC, `METRIC NAME`
targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
    exp_id AS EXP_ID,
    metric_name AS `METRIC NAME`,
    min(end_date) AS `FIRST CALCULATION (date)`,
    max(end_date) AS `LAST CALCULATION (date)`,
    
    argMax(is_main_metric, created_at) AS `METRIC TYPE`,
    argMax(reject, created_at) AS `REJECT`,
    argMax(left_bound, created_at) AS `LEFT BOUND`,
    argMax(effect, created_at) AS `OBSERVED EFFECT`,
    argMax(right_bound, created_at) AS `RIGHT BOUND`,
    metric_description AS `METRIC DESCRIPTION`
FROM (

    SELECT *
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results AS l GLOBAL ALL LEFT JOIN (
    
        SELECT 
            name AS metric_name,
            description AS metric_description
        FROM marts.exp_metrics_state
        ORDER BY event_date DESC, event_time DESC
        LIMIT 1 BY metric_name
    
    ) AS r USING metric_name
    WHERE end_date BETWEEN toDate(1699693860) AND toDate(1731316260)
    ORDER BY exp_id, metric_name, end_date DESC, pvalue
    LIMIT 1 BY exp_id, metric_name

) AS sq 
GROUP BY `METRIC NAME`, metric_description, exp_id
ORDER BY EXP_ID, `METRIC TYPE` DESC, `METRIC NAME`

options.content: EXPERIMENT: ${exp_id}

GROUPS

targets.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT
        group AS GROUP,
        min(event_date) AS `FIRST ADDED (date)`,
        max(event_date) AS `LAST ADDED (date)`,
        sum(users_added_in_group) AS users_added,
        sum(men_added_in_group) AS men_added,
        men_added / users_added AS men_added_pct,
        sum(women_added_in_group) AS women_added,
        women_added / users_added AS women_added_pct
    FROM marts.experiments_agg_daily_wo_curr_day
    WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
    GROUP BY exp_id, group
    ORDER BY group
targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
        group AS GROUP,
        min(event_date) AS `FIRST ADDED (date)`,
        max(event_date) AS `LAST ADDED (date)`,
        sum(users_added_in_group) AS users_added,
        sum(men_added_in_group) AS men_added,
        men_added / users_added AS men_added_pct,
        sum(women_added_in_group) AS women_added,
        women_added / users_added AS women_added_pct
    FROM marts.experiments_agg_daily_wo_curr_day
    WHERE exp_id = 'chat_quiz_v2'
    GROUP BY exp_id, group
    ORDER BY group

targets.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT 
    event_date,
    groupArray((group, users_added))
FROM (

    SELECT
        event_date,
        group,
        sum(users_added_in_group) AS users_added,
        sum(men_added_in_group) AS men_added,
        sum(women_added_in_group) AS women_added
    FROM marts.experiments_agg_daily_wo_curr_day
    WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
    GROUP BY event_date, group
    ORDER BY event_date, group 
    
) AS sq 
GROUP BY event_date  
ORDER BY event_date
targets.rawQuery:
SELECT 
    event_date,
    groupArray((group, users_added))
FROM (

    SELECT
        event_date,
        group,
        sum(users_added_in_group) AS users_added,
        sum(men_added_in_group) AS men_added,
        sum(women_added_in_group) AS women_added
    FROM marts.experiments_agg_daily_wo_curr_day
    WHERE exp_id = 'sellers_price'
    GROUP BY event_date, group
    ORDER BY event_date, group 
    
) AS sq 
GROUP BY event_date  
ORDER BY event_date

targets.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT
    metric_name AS `METRIC NAME`,
    min(end_date) AS `FIRST CALCULATION (date)`,
    max(end_date) AS `LAST CALCULATION (date)`,
    groups_compared  AS `GROUPS COMPARED`,
    argMin(is_main_metric, pvalue) AS `METRIC TYPE`,
    argMin(reject, pvalue) AS `REJECT`,
    argMin(left_bound, pvalue) AS `LEFT BOUND`,
    argMin(effect, pvalue) AS `OBSERVED EFFECT`,
    argMin(right_bound, pvalue) AS `RIGHT BOUND`,
    metric_description AS `METRIC DESCRIPTION`
FROM (
    
    SELECT 
        *,
        concat(name_1,' vs ',name_2) AS groups_compared
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results AS l GLOBAL ALL LEFT JOIN (
    
        SELECT 
            name AS metric_name,
            description AS metric_description
        FROM marts.exp_metrics_state
        ORDER BY event_date DESC, event_time DESC
        LIMIT 1 BY metric_name
    
    ) AS r USING metric_name
    WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate($from) AND toDate($to)
    ORDER BY metric_name, end_date DESC, ci_length
    LIMIT 1 BY metric_name, groups_compared

) AS sq 
GROUP BY metric_name, metric_description, groups_compared
ORDER BY `METRIC TYPE` DESC, groups_compared, metric_name
targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
    metric_name AS `METRIC NAME`,
    min(end_date) AS `FIRST CALCULATION (date)`,
    max(end_date) AS `LAST CALCULATION (date)`,
    groups_compared  AS `GROUPS COMPARED`,
    argMin(is_main_metric, pvalue) AS `METRIC TYPE`,
    argMin(reject, pvalue) AS `REJECT`,
    argMin(left_bound, pvalue) AS `LEFT BOUND`,
    argMin(effect, pvalue) AS `OBSERVED EFFECT`,
    argMin(right_bound, pvalue) AS `RIGHT BOUND`,
    metric_description AS `METRIC DESCRIPTION`
FROM (
    
    SELECT 
        *,
        concat(name_1,' vs ',name_2) AS groups_compared
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results AS l GLOBAL ALL LEFT JOIN (
    
        SELECT 
            name AS metric_name,
            description AS metric_description
        FROM marts.exp_metrics_state
        ORDER BY event_date DESC, event_time DESC
        LIMIT 1 BY metric_name
    
    ) AS r USING metric_name
    WHERE exp_id = 'dating_goals_old'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate(1735187614) AND toDate(1737321416)
    ORDER BY metric_name, end_date DESC, ci_length
    LIMIT 1 BY metric_name, groups_compared

) AS sq 
GROUP BY metric_name, metric_description, groups_compared
ORDER BY `METRIC TYPE` DESC, groups_compared, metric_name

CHOOSED METRIC COMPARISONS: ${metric_name}

targets.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT
        DISTINCT
        if(method_name = '$method_name' AND method_params = '$method_params', 1, 0) AS `IS CHOOSED`,
        method_name AS `METHOD NAME`,
        method_params AS `METHOD PARAMS`
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results 
    WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate($from) AND toDate($to)
        AND metric_name = '$metric_name'
targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
        DISTINCT
        if(method_name = 't-test' AND method_params = '{"alpha": 0.05, "test_type": "relative", "calculate_mde": true, "power": 0.8, "calculate_power": true, "mde": 0.1}', 1, 0) AS `IS CHOOSED`,
        method_name AS `METHOD NAME`,
        method_params AS `METHOD PARAMS`
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results 
    WHERE exp_id = 'vip_level_eight'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate(1698423927) AND toDate(1730049927)
        AND metric_name = 'arpu'

panels.description: *  MDE считается не для всех критериев, а только  для тех где это можно сделать простой формулой

options.content: MDE (not for all tests)
PVALUES
${groups_comparison} ${method_name}, ${method_params}

targets.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT 
    end_date,
    value_1,
    value_2,
    std_1,
    std_2,
    cov_value_1,
    cov_value_2
FROM (

    SELECT
        end_date,
        effect,
        pvalue,
        value_1,
        value_2,
        std_1,
        std_2,
        cov_value_1,
        cov_value_2
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
    WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate($from) AND toDate($to)
        AND metric_name = '$metric_name'
        AND concat(name_1,' vs ',name_2) = '$groups_comparison'
        AND method_name = '$method_name'
        AND method_params = '$method_params'

) AS sq 
ORDER BY end_date
targets.rawQuery:
/* grafana dashboard=Experiment Performance, user=109 */
SELECT 
    end_date,
    value_1,
    value_2,
    std_1,
    std_2,
    cov_value_1,
    cov_value_2
FROM (

    SELECT
        end_date,
        effect,
        pvalue,
        value_1,
        value_2,
        std_1,
        std_2,
        cov_value_1,
        cov_value_2
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
    WHERE exp_id = 'dating_goals_extended_levels'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate(1738229881) AND toDate(1746005881)
        AND metric_name = 'avg_room_time_per_visitor_reg_before_exp_start_not_novice'
        AND concat(name_1,' vs ',name_2) = ''control vs target_1'
        AND method_name = 't-test'
        AND method_params = '{"alpha": 0.05, "test_type": "relative", "calculate_mde": true, "power": 0.8}'

) AS sq 
ORDER BY end_date

targets.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT 
    end_date,
    left_bound,
    effect,
    right_bound,
    avg_group_size
FROM (

    SELECT
        end_date, 
        effect,
        pvalue,
        left_bound, right_bound,
        day,
        (size_1 + size_2) / 2 AS avg_group_size,
        mde_1,
        mde_2
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
    WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate($from) AND toDate($to)
        AND metric_name = '$metric_name'
        AND concat(name_1,' vs ',name_2) = '$groups_comparison'
        AND method_name = '$method_name'
        AND method_params = '$method_params'
        
) AS sq
ORDER BY end_date
targets.rawQuery:
/* grafana dashboard=Experiment Performance, user=109 */

    end_date,
    left_bound,
    effect,
    right_bound,
    avg_group_size
FROM (

        mde_2
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
    WHERE exp_id = 'dating_goals_extended_levels'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate(1745314740) AND toDate(1746005940)
        AND metric_name = 'avg_room_time_per_visitor_reg_before_exp_start_not_novice'
        AND concat(name_1,' vs ',name_2) = 'control vs target_1
        AND method_name = 't-test'
        AND method_params = '{"alpha": 0.05, "test_type": "relative", "calculate_mde": true, "power": 0.8}'
        
) AS sq
ORDER BY end_date

    WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate($from) AND toDate($to)
        AND metric_name = '$metric_name'
        AND concat(name_1,' vs ',name_2) = '$groups_comparison'
        AND method_name = '$method_name'
        AND method_params = '$method_params'
        
) AS sq
ORDER BY end_date

targets.formattedQuery: SELECT $timeSeries as t, count() FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY t ORDER BY t
targets.query:
SELECT
        start_date, 
        end_date, 
        day, 
        
        metric_query, 
        metric_rendered_query, 
        
        concat(name_1, ' vs ', name_2) AS comparison, 
        value_1, 
        value_2, 
        std_1, 
        std_2, 
        size_1, 
        size_2, 
        
        alpha, 
        pvalue, 
        effect, 
        left_bound, 
        right_bound, 
        reject
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
    WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate($from) AND toDate($to)
        AND metric_name = '$metric_name'
        AND method_name = '$method_name'
        AND method_params = '$method_params'
    ORDER BY start_date, end_date
targets.rawQuery:
SELECT
        start_date, 
        end_date, 
        day, 
        
        metric_query, 
        metric_rendered_query, 
        
        concat(name_1, ' vs ', name_2) AS comparison, 
        value_1, 
        value_2, 
        std_1, 
        std_2, 
        size_1, 
        size_2, 
        
        alpha, 
        pvalue, 
        effect, 
        left_bound, 
        right_bound, 
        reject
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
    WHERE exp_id = 'dating_real_photo'
        AND end_date BETWEEN toDate(1724756027) AND toDate(1732535627)
        AND metric_name = 'r3'
        AND method_name = 'z-test'
        AND method_params = '{"alpha": 0.05, "test_type": "relative", "calculate_mde": true, "power": 0.8}'
    ORDER BY start_date, end_date

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT exp_id 
FROM marts.experiments_agg_daily 
WHERE event_date BETWEEN toDate($from) - 30 AND toDate($to) 
AND exp_id GLOBAL IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT exp_id 
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results 
    WHERE end_date BETWEEN toDate($from) - 30 AND toDate($to)
)
GROUP BY exp_id ORDER BY exp_id
list.name: exp_id
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT exp_id 
FROM marts.experiments_agg_daily 
WHERE event_date BETWEEN toDate($from) - 30 AND toDate($to) 
AND exp_id GLOBAL IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT exp_id 
    FROM marts.exp_comparison_results 
    WHERE end_date BETWEEN toDate($from) - 30 AND toDate($to)
)
GROUP BY exp_id ORDER BY exp_id

SELECT
    DISTINCT metric_name
FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
ORDER BY is_main_metric DESC, metric_name

    DISTINCT metric_name
FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
ORDER BY is_main_metric DESC, metric_name

FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
AND metric_name = '$metric_name'
ORDER BY comparison_name

    DISTINCT concat(name_1,' vs ',name_2) AS comparison_name
FROM marts.exp_comparison_results
WHERE exp_id = '$exp_id'
AND metric_name = '$metric_name'
ORDER BY comparison_name
